Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The task is to produce a BPMN like textual process model from the interview excerpts about the invoice approval process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Invoice approval begins when an invoice arrives typically by email and ends when it is scheduled for payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The flow is mostly linear but contains several decision gateways and exception loops

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Roles are distributed across Accounts Payable AP Purchasing Management and 3rd party support Supplier Relationship Manager The accounting system acts as the central data store

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Participants Lanes Accounts Payable Clerk Mary primary executor Accounts Payable Supervisor Rita exception handler Purchasing Officer Dan PO validation and confirmation Department Manager Carlos final sign off Supplier Relationship Manager Karen external issue resolution Supplier provides corrected documents Accounting System stores invoice and PO data

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Receive Invoice AP Clerk 1 Input Invoice document Output Invoice logged in system

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Check for valid PO Gateway Exclusive No Request more details from supplier AP Clerk 2 Possible rework loop or escalation to Rita Yes Log invoice into accounting system AP Clerk 3
